connecting to a known smart contract.  \n- No signs of malicious code, obfuscation, or data exfiltration are present.  \n- The only minor point is in Report 5, where the securityRisk is slightly above zero due to the large embedded bytecode, but given that it's typical for smart contracts, this is acceptable.\n\n### Final recommendation:\n- **Malware score:** 0 across all reports.  \n-
